creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Alex!

Could you split these two changes (version update, mark unbroken fix) up into individual diffs please. This will enable one to be committed to the 2015Q4 quarterly branch (where it is still broken).

Please also include them as attachments here, rather than links hosted offsite.

On the other hand, Pawel, can you handle these two changes separately?
